name: meok-haulage-governance-bridge-mcp
title: Meok Haulage Governance Bridge Mcp
description: The MEOK Compliance-to-Governance Bridge. Crosswalk any haulage compliance attestation (DVSA, FMCSA, EU 561, BS 7121, NHVR, IATA DGR, IMO MARPOL, etc.) into the matching EU AI Act + AI governance obligations. Single integration MCP. By MEOK AI Labs.
